---
id: get-companies-company-id-supplier-payment-details
title: "get-companyId-supplierPaymentDetails"
description: "This service retrieves payment details of orders pending payment to suppliers.If an order is already paid then the orderId will not be retrieved in this service."
sidebar_label: "get-companyId-supplierPaymentDetails"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api:

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"get-companyId-supplierPaymentDetails"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/companies/{companyId}/supplierPaymentDetails"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



This service retrieves payment details of orders pending payment to suppliers.If an order is already paid then the orderId will not be retrieved in this service.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
